rulings.Case Title: SUSANNE FORS VS. SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 20, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC, GROWTH EQUITY PARTNERS LLC, ASHOK GUJRAL MOTION TO STRIKE 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED as follows: Paragraph 5, except the following language: "Plaintiff is informed and believes, and thereon alleges, that Gujral has for many years conducted investment reals estate operation in San Francisco¿ . Unitl March 15, 2011 Gujral held a broker license issued by the California Bureau of Real Estate. Paragraphs 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 35, 42, 49, and Ex. 1. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LAI FONG LEONG ET AL VS. CHAN 1985 TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 20, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT CHAN 1985 TRUST, PAULINE CHAN, LAWRENCE CHAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Dorothy Leong to indicate clearly (1) which causes of action are being brought on behalf of her mother; and (2) which causes of action, if any, are being brought on her own behalf. If none of the causes of action are brought on her own behalf (as suggested in opposition), Dorothy shall remove allegations regarding damages suffered by her individually as such allegations rendered the complaint uncertain. If Dorothy alleges any of the causes of action on her own behalf, facts supporting standing to do so must be alleged. All new allegations to be in bold font. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL ROLLINS ET AL VS. HWAGIN CHIANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Otice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 20, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ROLLINS, HEIDY ROLLINS Otice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Court notes that Notice of Motion do not fully comply with CRC 3.1110 and 3.1324. In the future non-compliant motions will be denied. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CAROLYN GAGE VS. SHERWOOD EQUITY INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 20, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT GP STONE II, LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED: 1. Demurer to the causes of action for fraud and misrepresentation is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of fraud and misrepresentation, including who, when, and in what manner made the representations; that representation was false at the time it was made; and that Plaintiff reasonably relied on the misrepresentation. The Court notes that currently the sole representation alleged to have been made to Plaintiff is described in paragraph 36(h). (Other assertions inparagraph 36 are not "representations" and/or they are not alleged to be false). This representation is alleged to have been made "per the purchase contract." Purchase Contract is located in Ex. A (per paragraph 36(a). No representation described in paragraph 36(h) can be located in Ex. A. 2. Demurrer to the cause of action for FTC Act violation is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that she may bring such a claim. Any request for leave to amend to add a new cause of action shall by properly noticed motion for leave to amend. 3. Demurrer to the causes of action for violation of B&P 17203 and equitable estoppel is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of these causes of action. The Court further notes that Plaintiff's opposition was untimely filed and served via regular mail. If Plaintiff fails to comply with CCP requirements for filing and service in the future, the filings will be stricken. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 22ND AVE SF, LLC VS. CHUNG MING CHOW ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compellinf Defendant Chung Ming Chow: 1. To Provide Responses To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories 2. To Provide Written Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday December 20, 2018 line 10. PLAINTIFF 22ND AVE SF, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compellinf Defendant Chung Ming Chow: 1. To Provide Responses To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogatories 2. To Provide Written Responses To Plaintiff'S Request For Production GRANTED. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant to provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $710. = (501/CFH)
